props.name: children
props.description: This will be the Button description.

props.name: href
props.description:
**May only be used when `as` is set to 'a'**.
 The URL the button links to. If `as` is set to 'a', this prop is required.

props.name: variant
props.description: Changes the look and feel of the button which is different for each variant

props.name: size
props.description: Changes the size of the icon button component

props.name: inactive
props.description: Whether the button looks visually disabled, but can still accept all the same interactions as an enabled button.

props.name: icon
props.description: provide an octicon. It will be placed in the center of the button

props.name: loading
props.description: When true, the button is in a loading state. It displays a spinner, sets `aria-disabled`, and preserves focus. A screen reader announcement is automatically rendered using an ARIA live region — see the `loadingAnnouncement` prop to customize it.

props.name: loadingAnnouncement
props.description: The message announced to screen readers when the button enters a loading state. The announcement is rendered in a visually hidden ARIA live region. Consumers do not need to implement their own live region for the loading state — this is handled automatically. Customize this prop to provide a more specific message, for example "Saving profile".

props.name: aria-label
props.description: Use an aria label to describe the functionality of the button. Please refer to [our guidance on alt text](https://primer.style/guides/accessibility/alternative-text-for-images) for tips on writing good alternative text.

props.name: keybindingHint
props.description: Optional keybinding hint to show in the tooltip for this button. Pass a string for a single shortcut or an array of strings to show multiple shortcuts joined with "or". See the `KeybindingHint` component documentation for the correct format. Has no effect if tooltip is overridden or disabled. Does **not** bind any keybindings for this button - this is only for visual hints.

props.name: description
props.description: If `description` is provided, we will use a Tooltip to describe the button. Then `aria-label` is used to label the button.
